description: Create a complete navigation light recognition drill package for a maritime academy by setting up five scenario directories in /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/ named 'p) Light Drill 1 - Power Driven', 'q) Light Drill 2 - Sailing Vessel', 'r) Light Drill 3 - Vessel Restricted Ability', 's) Light Drill 4 - Fishing Vessel', and 't) Light Drill 5 - Vessel Aground'. Each scenario must contain valid environment.ini (Nighttime 22:00-04:00, Visibility >=8nm, Weather <=1), ownship.ini (Stationary, facing target), and othership.ini (one vessel of the specified type 0.5-1.5nm away) files. Generate an instructor answer key at /home/ga/Documents/light_drill_answer_key.txt listing the drills, vessel types, and applicable COLREGS Rules (23, 25, 27, 26, and 30), and a student response sheet with blank observation fields at /home/ga/Documents/light_drill_student_sheet.txt. Ensure bc5.ini is configured with hide_instruments=0 and full_radar=1.

required_scenarios: r) Light Drill 3 - Vessel Restricted Ability
